title: Phoenix end season on high
description: KNYSNA NEWS - The A team of Formosa Phoenix...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - The A team of Formosa Phoenix rugby club this past weekend won a tightly contested game against Black Warriors, to take third place in this year's SWD Coastal League.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - The A team of Formosa Phoenix rugby club this past weekend won a tightly contested game against Black Warriors, to take third place in this year's SWD Coastal League."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The game was played in Mossel Bay at the Van Riebeeck Stadium, and the final score was 25-17."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For Phoenix, Monté Scholtz (wing), Chumani Williams (centre) and Shemandré Hans (prop) each scored a try. Shaun Jacobs (flyhalf) was successful with two conversions and and two penalty kicks.","html":"For Phoenix, Monté Scholtz (wing), Chumani Williams (centre) and Shemandré Hans (prop) each scored a try. Shaun Jacobs (flyhalf) was successful with two conversions and and two penalty kicks."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
